nasb.text: And just as it happened in the days of Noah, so it will be also in the days of the Son of Man:

esv.text: Just as it was in the days of Noah, so will it be in the days of the Son of Man.

cnv.text: 挪亞的時代怎樣，人子的時代也是怎樣。

ccb.text: “人子降临时的情形将像挪亚的时代，

csbs.text: “在挪亚的那些日子里发生的怎样，在人子的那些日子里也将要怎样：
